commit_scope: Confirm BMF choice policy boundaries and speed the indexed object-rule path by skipping duplicate candidate checks after an exact or wildcard bucket has already proven eligibility.

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/bmf-choice-receipts.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk

cd form && /usr/bin/time -p ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/python-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/python-bmf-full-file-band.fk

cd form && /usr/bin/time -p ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-compile-source-proof.fk
cd form && mkdir -p ../.cache/bmf-choice-path-perf && bash -o pipefail -c '/usr/bin/time -p ./validate.sh 2>&1 | tee ../.cache/bmf-choice-path-perf/validate_full_20260609.txt'
local_validation.summary: The BMF choice surface was already correctly split: literal-only object alternatives can use choose_any, while indexed compiler rule dispatch uses choose_best. The implementation now avoids rechecking object-rule-index-entry-candidate? for entries in an exact/wild bucket selected by apply-object-rule-buckets; ordered and unknown fallback paths keep candidate checks. Rebased focused sibling-kernel proofs pass.

bmf_choice_receipt_band.interpretation: neutral; small band dominated by validator orchestration

python_bmf_full_file.interpretation: largest wall-clock signal; user/sys movement is smaller, so keep measuring before treating this as stable throughput

bml_thesis_bmf_compile_source_proof.interpretation: roughly neutral/slightly slower in this sample

known_limitations: The timing commands are end-to-end sibling-kernel validation samples, not isolated kernel microbenchmarks.
The exploratory bench mode was not used as pass evidence because TypeScript bench mode reported a pre-existing sum1000 mismatch.
Raw direct-kernel trace/timing attempts were not used as pass evidence because the source-compile workload shape differs from validate.sh's prepared-source path.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted yet for this internal Form kernel hot-path change.

phase_gate.notes: Local focused proof and performance samples pass on the rebased branch. Commit, PR, CI, merge, and post-deploy verification remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BMF/BML compiler rule dispatch keeps choose_best semantics while exact/wild indexed buckets execute known-candidate entries without a second candidate predicate pass. Literal-only object choices remain choose_any through the existing object-choice-direct-safe? boundary.
